text: Welcome to the community, helper_alex! You've been approved as a moderator. Thank you for joining us!
Welcome guide_sam! You've been approved as an event helper. We're excited to have you on board!
Welcome mentor_lina! You've been approved as a mentor. Your experience will be valuable to our community!
Welcome newbie_kim! You've been approved as a member. We're glad to have you join our community!
